target: Data correctness: governance stress story and run-audit error flags
change: Included all loaded stress buckets for governance-story worst-bucket selection; split Ray root-cause errors from Ray/Tune traceback mentions; clarified the model-summary row KPI.
test_added: test_governance_story_matches_source_csv_metrics; test_error_flags_match_errors_csv_counts

change: Added an explicit insight panel explaining when selected finalist ensembles are true single-component 100% selections rather than dummy bars.
test_added: test_ensemble_composition_explains_single_component_finalists; Playwright assertion for Single-component finalist selection

change: Added a 10% high-risk guide line and plain-language stress readout naming the worst stream/bucket and streams crossing the guide.
test_added: test_stress_chart_and_readout_include_high_risk_threshold; Playwright assertions for 10% high-risk guide and Stress read

change: Added a forecast readout summarising selected-view average absolute error, average bias direction, and largest miss.
test_added: test_forecast_error_readout_summarises_selected_rows; Playwright assertion for Forecast read

change: Added a Run Health Summary with file coverage, missing datasets, logged diagnostics, root-cause Ray count, and materiality readout before detailed tables.
test_added: test_run_health_summary_interprets_error_materiality; Playwright assertions for Run Health Summary and Run health read

change: Added compact controls, inventory KPI cards, and an Inventory readout that names the best quarterly and annual rows before the dense candidate table.
test_added: test_inventory_summary_lifts_key_counts_and_best_rows; Playwright assertions for Inventory read, Filtered rows, Streams represented, and Source families

change: Added decision-status cards, candidate outlier toggle, efficient-frontier trace and annotations, percent-error chart, horizon MAPE chart, run-audit error-type chart, and moved dense detail rows into expanders.
test_added: test_candidate_landscape_focuses_competitive_frontier; test_candidate_outlier_filter_preserves_finalists_and_schiff; test_forecast_error_charts_include_time_and_horizon_views; test_error_type_chart_is_populated_from_error_summary; strengthened Playwright page assertions

change: Aligned Stress Checks with all loaded stress buckets including 2020-21, added stress high-risk band, normalised ensemble fallback scoring across origin-level rows, and added percent-unit diagnostics for future schema drift.
test_added: test_percent_unit_warning_detects_mixed_units; test_ensemble_fallback_scores_normalise_origin_level_weights; stress bucket and high-risk band assertions

change: Added exportable management summary, first-screen data-quality warning panel, and model-detail section linking a selected model to MAPE, Schiff, stress, and component evidence.
test_added: management_summary_markdown and data_quality_warning_readout assertions; test_model_detail_summary_links_model_to_schiff_stress_and_components; Playwright assertions for export and model detail

change: Added Schiff purity classifier, surfaced the class in candidate hover data, and added Model Inventory visuals for model-family performance and pure-Schiff-versus-challenger mix.
test_added: test_schiff_purity_classifier_separates_residuals_and_blends; test_inventory_visuals_show_family_performance_and_schiff_mix; Playwright assertions for inventory visuals

change: Updated browser tests to save required final screenshots, added sprint lock and verifier gates, wrote spec conformance, product-improvement, assertion-inventory, review, and management-readiness artifacts.
test_added: Playwright screenshot artifact generation strengthened; verifier checks product sprint artifact set and quality quotas

change: Added an explicit loader schema version to the Streamlit cache key so newly derived governance fields such as schiff_class cannot be hidden by stale cached LoadedRun objects.
test_added: test_loader_schema_version_invalidates_streamlit_cache_for_schema_changes; strengthened inventory visual test to assert schiff_class is present in loaded run data

target: First-viewport visual polish and warning placement
change: Moved technical percent-unit schema diagnostics out of the global warning stack and into Run Audit so management pages open with decision content and charts rather than technical audit banners.
test_added: test_schema_diagnostics_are_kept_out_of_global_warning_stack; Playwright assertion that Executive Summary does not show mixed percent-unit diagnostics and Run Audit exposes Schema diagnostics

change: Added an enterprise readiness decision brief above the KPI grid so the first screen immediately states Stage 1 readiness, pure-Schiff benchmark outcome, watch point, and Stage 2 gate.
test_added: test_enterprise_decision_brief_summarises_readiness_and_next_gate; Playwright assertions for Enterprise readiness view, Stage 1 governance decision brief, and Stage 2 uncertainty

change: Reframed the dashboard around Overview, Diagnostics, Scenario Comparison, and Schiff Benchmark primary pages with a navy/lime masthead, page indicators, footer strip, and supporting analytical tabs retained for drilldown.
test_added: Streamlit smoke asserts the first four tabs; Playwright asserts WAKA KOTAHI, Governance filters, page indicators, and four reference pages.

change: Added a visible governance filter bar, reset filters action, active filter chips, and JSON export of current view settings; empty multiselect semantics now return empty frames instead of silently widening results.
test_added: test_empty_common_filter_selections_return_empty_frames; Playwright reset and view-state export assertions.

change: Built an Overview page containing the five supplied report-figure surfaces: finalist accuracy, candidate landscape, ensemble composition, stress/horizon checks, and error distribution.
test_added: Playwright assertions for all five numbered Overview chart modules and final-01-overview screenshot generation.

target: Diagnostics, Scenario Comparison, and Schiff Benchmark completeness
change: Added Diagnostics with governed not-available states, Scenario Comparison using finalist versus Schiff when scenario files are absent, and a Schiff Benchmark page with benchmark cards, replication notes, and cross-validation-style horizon charts.
test_added: Playwright assertions for Diagnostics, Scenario A/B controls, decision lens, benchmark notes, and comparison summary.

target: Candidate export, model selector completeness, and horizon filter polish
change: Added page-local Candidate Landscape CSV export, removed the Model Detail 80-row selector cap after filtering, and connected the top-level horizon selector to the Forecasts and Errors horizon bucket control.
test_added: test_candidate_landscape_export_columns_are_available; Playwright assertions for Candidate Landscape download, full model selector note, and horizon controls.

target: Strict product-hardening gates and visual reference evidence
change: Added VISUAL_SPEC and INTERACTION_SPEC locks, a structural visual-reference comparison generator, stricter verifier gates for 20 loops, 9.5 deep scores, visual scores, reviewer files, screenshots, and reference artifacts.
test_added: scripts/verify_dashboard.ps1 invokes scripts/visual_reference_check.py and enforces the strict artifact, loop, score, screenshot, and assertion gates.

target: Visual-fidelity lock and strict verifier expansion
change: Added VISUAL_DEFECT_BACKLOG.lock.md and REFERENCE_PAGE_WIREFRAMES.lock.md, then strengthened verify_dashboard.ps1 to require the visual backlog, wireframes, layout-grid review, 50 loops, 50 improvements, and 50 assertion evidence before completion.
test_added: Verifier now hard-fails unresolved visual defects and insufficient visual/product loop count.

change: Replaced the cluttered Streamlit tab shell with a compact four-page governance navigation control aligned under the masthead; supporting modules remain in drilldown expanders.
test_added: test_navigation_labels_not_clipped asserts Schiff Benchmark is readable and the clipped <nchmark text is absent.

change: Moved advanced controls behind a More popover, kept full selected filter values as chips, and aligned the compact navy Reset Filters action with the filter row.
test_added: test_filter_values_are_readable asserts Stream: All Streams, Family: All Families, and Horizon: 1-12 Quarters are visible.

change: Removed duplicate in-plot titles from chart cards, fixed KPI-card layout, shortened stream axis labels, and reduced overview chart heights so the management grid matches the supplied reference more closely.
test_added: test_overview_has_dashboard_grid strengthened with wide-viewport screenshots of all five overview chart modules.

target: Candidate landscape and ensemble composition visual repair
change: Removed cluttered compact landscape annotations, ordered finalist accuracy streams to match the report, used report-reference ensemble composition in the overview panel, and added x-axis headroom for ensemble weight labels.
test_added: test_ensemble_composition_has_three_stream_panels and screenshot artifact checks verify the three stream mini-panels and readable labels.

change: Added compact scenario decision KPI cards and moved the verbose decision lens below the primary chart row so the scenario page opens with management metrics and charts.
test_added: test_scenario_kpi_cards_lift_decision_metrics verifies scenario KPIs are populated from finalist, paired-vs-Schiff, and governance-story evidence.

change: Reduced the Improvement vs Benchmark panel to one best paired challenger per stream instead of a dense list of technical candidate identifiers.
test_added: test_scenario_best_paired_by_stream_keeps_one_manager_row_per_stream verifies each stream keeps the maximum-gain paired row.

change: Relabelled the scenario improvement chart by readable stream names rather than raw challenger model IDs while preserving the underlying paired evidence.
test_added: test_scenario_paired_display_rows_use_readable_stream_labels verifies management-chart rows use stream labels and no technical double-underscore identifiers.

change: Rebuilt the Overview first viewport with compact reference-style filter boxes, tighter masthead/navigation/KPI spacing, shorter chart canvases, and all five required Overview modules visible at the 1680 x 940 management-review viewport.
test_added: test_overview_has_dashboard_grid now asserts all five numbered Overview module titles are above the first viewport fold; filter browser assertions now include Forecast Vintage and Date Window values.

change: Rebuilt Diagnostics into a six-panel reference-style grid, moved explanatory narrative into a notes expander, and added a central-error diagnostic view so extreme forecast-error tails no longer flatten the first-viewport chart.
test_added: test_central_error_window_keeps_diagnostics_readable verifies outlier trimming; Playwright now asserts all six Diagnostics panel titles are above the first viewport fold.

change: Rebuilt Scenario Comparison with compact scenario A/B/baseline control boxes, a six-panel reference-style chart and decision grid, and central-error distribution so the box plot is not flattened by extreme forecast-error tails.
test_added: Playwright now asserts the compact Scenario A/B controls and all six Scenario Comparison panel titles are above the first viewport fold.

change: Compacted the Schiff Benchmark page by removing the extra section title, shortening the main benchmark chart, replacing paragraph-heavy notes with a concise replication card, and bringing the three stream cross-validation panels into the first viewport.
test_added: Playwright now asserts the main Schiff benchmark chart, paper replication notes, and all three stream cross-validation panels are above the first viewport fold.

change: Hid residual Streamlit chrome such as the Deploy control from management-review screenshots so the governance header reads as a standalone dashboard surface.
test_added: Playwright now asserts the visible page body does not contain the Streamlit Deploy control.

change: Changed the Overview stress chart to the canonical six reference/report buckets while retaining extra run-specific stress buckets on the detailed Stress page.
test_added: test_overview_stress_frame_matches_reference_buckets verifies the Overview excludes 2020-21 and includes the six required reference buckets.

change: Changed the Overview forecast-error box plot to use the central error window so management screenshots show the central distribution rather than being stretched by tail observations.
test_added: Playwright now asserts the Overview describes the error plot as a central absolute percentage error view.

change: Replaced the Diagnostics actual-vs-predicted time-series proxy with a residual-vs-fitted scatter proxy using central error rows, making the panel closer to the diagnostics reference layout.
test_added: test_residual_vs_fitted_proxy_is_populated verifies the new diagnostic chart and Playwright asserts the residual-style scatter description is visible.

change: Shortened the Scenario Comparison decision lens into a concise Stage 2-ready management read while keeping detailed stream governance cards below the first viewport.
test_added: test_scenario_decision_lens_summary_is_concise verifies the summary length and key language; Playwright asserts the Stage 2 decision text is visible.

change: Moved the best paired-vs-Schiff comparison read into the visible benchmark evidence card and demoted the full paired rows to a drilldown expander.
test_added: test_schiff_compact_summary_lifts_best_paired_gain verifies the compact summary and Playwright asserts the best paired challenger text is visible.

change: Clarified the Overview Governance Score KPI so it explicitly names the pure-Schiff benchmark rule and logged diagnostics count in the first-screen management card.
test_added: test_overview_kpi_cards_explain_pure_schiff_and_diagnostics verifies the KPI copy, and Playwright asserts beat pure Schiff plus logged diagnostics are visible.

change: Renamed the Diagnostics KPI cards to Diagnostic Coverage, Missing Outputs, Logged Diagnostics, and Ray Root Causes so the page reads like a diagnostic governance dashboard while remaining backed by run file-status and errors.csv evidence.
test_added: test_run_health_summary_interprets_error_materiality now verifies the reference-style KPI names, and Playwright asserts Diagnostic Coverage plus Logged Diagnostics are visible.

change: Changed the Scenario Comparison gain KPI to show percentage-point gain and explicit Scenario A versus pure-Schiff wording instead of formatting the paired improvement as a percentage.
test_added: test_scenario_kpi_cards_lift_decision_metrics now asserts pp gain semantics, Scenario A versus pure-Schiff copy, and A/Schiff direction; Playwright asserts the scenario comparison text is visible.

change: Added a compact data-backed frontier note below the Overview candidate landscape chart naming the lower-left rule, loaded candidate count, and pure-Schiff benchmark row count.
test_added: test_overview_frontier_note_is_data_backed verifies candidate and pure-Schiff counts, and Playwright asserts the frontier note is visible.

change: Reworked the Schiff Benchmark KPI row to use Pure-Schiff Streams, Best Pure-Schiff Qtr MAPE, Best Finalist Qtr MAPE, and Paired Comparisons labels so residual/blend challengers cannot be mistaken for the structural benchmark.
test_added: test_schiff_kpi_cards_keep_pure_benchmark_language verifies the pure-benchmark KPI language, and Playwright asserts Pure-Schiff Streams plus structural benchmark only are visible.

change: Added a compact visible Diagnostics provenance note that names the forecast residual and feature-count evidence available in the run and states that unavailable classical ADF, Durbin-Watson and Breusch-Pagan files are represented by labelled proxy panels.
test_added: test_diagnostics_provenance_note_names_proxy_evidence verifies the provenance text, and Playwright asserts Diagnostics provenance is visible.

change: Added a visible decision-rule line to the Scenario Comparison decision lens explaining that the beats-Schiff rule requires positive paired MAPE gain plus challenger win rate above 55%.
test_added: test_scenario_decision_rule_text_explains_beats_schiff_badge verifies the rule copy, and Playwright asserts win rate above 55% is visible.

change: Replaced the generic Overview stress caption with a data-backed stress-watch note naming the weakest visible stream, stress bucket, and MAPE value.
test_added: test_overview_stress_watch_note_names_worst_visible_bucket verifies the stress-watch note, and Playwright asserts Stress watch plus weakest visible point are visible.

change: Added a data-backed drilldown sentence to the Scenario Comparison decision lens that points managers to full forecast-error tails and stress rows below the primary grid.
test_added: test_scenario_drilldown_note_names_full_tail_evidence verifies prediction/stress row counts, and Playwright asserts full forecast-error tails plus Forecast and stress drilldown are visible.

change: Replaced the terse run caption with a compact run-evidence caption showing run name, files-loaded coverage, stage filter, and data-as-of label.
test_added: test_run_evidence_caption_names_run_files_and_data_as_of verifies the caption; Playwright now waits for Run evidence and files loaded.

change: Extended the run-evidence caption to state the visible model-family scope, including the all-families count when all source families are selected.
test_added: test_run_evidence_caption_names_run_files_family_scope_and_data_as_of verifies family scope, and Playwright asserts Family scope is visible.

change: Replaced the generic Overview forecast-error boxplot caption with a data-backed note naming finalist prediction-row count and directing full tails to the Forecasts and Errors page.
test_added: test_overview_error_distribution_note_names_prediction_rows verifies the note, and Playwright asserts Error distribution read plus full tails remain in Forecasts and Errors.

change: Tightened the shared governance shell for the narrower in-app browser: page indicators now wrap instead of clipping, active navigation uses the reference navy/lime treatment, filter values remain readable without ellipses, and chart-card columns stack into readable full-width panels below the management-review breakpoint.
test_added: test_governance_shell_is_readable_in_narrow_browser verifies narrow-browser navigation, filter readability, no horizontal overflow, and stacked overview chart-title positions.

target: Desktop reference masthead and navigation integration
change: Lifted the primary governance navigation into the desktop masthead band, shifted it to the right of the Governance title to better match the supplied reference, tightened the top filter band, and added a narrow-screen override so the in-app browser keeps the nav below the title without overlap.
test_added: test_reference_header_nav_is_integrated_on_desktop verifies desktop nav y-position, right-side placement relative to the Governance title, and filter-band position; test_governance_shell_is_readable_in_narrow_browser now verifies the narrow nav sits below the title rather than overlapping it.

target: Overview in-app browser reference grid readability
change: Removed the cramped masthead subtitle from the visual header, tightened the in-app filter grid to three compact filter columns, and changed the Overview responsive chart layout to two readable dashboard columns rather than a single vertical stack or an unreadable three-column squeeze.
test_added: test_governance_shell_is_readable_in_narrow_browser now verifies the first two Overview chart cards share the first chart row at the in-app browser width instead of stacking vertically.

change: Replaced the dense signed-error-over-time cloud in the Diagnostics autocorrelation card with a residual ACF-by-lag bar chart, bringing the page closer to the supplied diagnostics reference while using real loaded forecast-error rows.
test_added: test_autocorrelation_diagnostics_uses_lag_bars verifies the ACF chart is bar-based and labelled by lag; Playwright now asserts the Diagnostics page exposes the residual ACF description.

change: Shortened the scenario control popover from a long 'Scenario settings' label to a compact 'Edit' action so the Scenario A, Scenario B, and Baseline controls remain readable in the in-app browser wireframe.
test_added: Playwright now asserts the compact Edit button is visible on Scenario Comparison and the long Scenario settings label is absent from the page body.

change: Reduced the structural benchmark chart height and compacted the benchmark comparison / paper replication notes panel so the first cross-validation panels move into the in-app browser viewport.
test_added: Existing Schiff Benchmark browser assertions now exercise the compact notes card and regenerated loop-56 screenshots verify the cross-validation panels are visible earlier.

target: Diagnostics and Schiff Benchmark KPI-row reference fidelity
change: Converted the Diagnostics and Schiff Benchmark KPI rows from plain two-by-two cards into the shared icon-tile governance KPI card row used by the reference-style pages.
test_added: test_primary_reference_pages_use_icon_kpi_rows verifies the Diagnostics and Schiff Benchmark pages render four governance KPI cards in a dense aligned row at the in-app browser width.

change: Fixed the governance page render order and radio styling so clicking visible navigation text updates the page body as well as the page chip, avoiding stale Overview content under Diagnostics or Schiff Benchmark.
test_added: test_visible_navigation_text_changes_page_body clicks the visible nav labels and asserts the expected page body replaces the prior page content.

change: Compressed the governance filter card by replacing the Streamlit caption block with a compact run-evidence line and tightening filter/KPI spacing so the first KPI and chart rows move closer to the supplied reference layout.
test_added: test_filter_band_is_reference_compact asserts the filter-to-KPI geometry and first chart position stay within the reference-density target.

change: Compressed the Diagnostics provenance line, shortened diagnostic chart heights, replaced stale-prone empty caption slots with deterministic placeholders, and added data-backed diagnostic captions so the in-app Diagnostics grid no longer shows lingering Overview notes.
test_added: test_diagnostics_in_app_grid_replaces_overview_panels verifies the compact Diagnostics evidence strip, first three Diagnostics panels above the fold, data-backed diagnostic captions, and absence of visible Overview ghost captions.

change: Reduced the Scenario Comparison primary chart heights so the improvement-vs-benchmark panel moves higher in the narrow in-app browser while preserving readable axis labels and management cards.
test_added: test_scenario_in_app_grid_brings_improvement_panel_into_view verifies the first three Scenario Comparison panels are above the fold and the improvement panel starts before y=790 in the 820px viewport.

target: Primary filters and Plotly hover polish
change: Converted the visible governance filter row into directly clickable Streamlit selectboxes and routed major Plotly hover labels through management-readable formatting helpers.
test_added: tests/test_filter_and_hover.py verifies direct filter opening/selection/reset, KPI/chart-region updates after filter changes, and human-readable hovers for finalist accuracy, candidate landscape, ensemble composition, and stress checks.
